rows.notes: P66 starts only after the landed P65 successor control-sync wave.
The review must cover the exact one-sided three-commit delta from p63 to p64.
The reviewed delta must stay inside docs/export/control/release surfaces.
The reviewed successor delta should expose exactly three commits before publication freeze.
The review happens before the live published branch is promoted from p63 to p66.
The review artifacts should be recorded from the future freeze branch.
